interview_state_structure.current_phase: string (Introduction, Core HR Questions, Role-based Evaluation, Closing)

conversation_phases.name: Introduction
conversation_phases.description: Greeting the candidate, verifying identity, and explaining the interview format.

conversation_phases.name: Core HR Questions
conversation_phases.description: General behavioral and background questions applicable to all candidates (e.g., Self-introduction, Career goals, Availability).

conversation_phases.name: Role-based Evaluation
conversation_phases.description: Specific questions dynamically generated based on candidate experience level (Fresher/Experienced) and job role (Technical/Non-technical).

conversation_phases.name: Closing
conversation_phases.description: Wrapping up the interview, answering candidate questions, and explaining next steps.

questions.text: Could you please introduce yourself and give me a brief overview of your background?
Walk me through your most recent role. What were your primary responsibilities and biggest achievements?
Since you are early in your career, can you talk about the projects or coursework that best prepared you for this role?
What would you consider to be your greatest professional strength, and what is an area you are actively trying to improve?
Describe a time when you had to explain a complex technical problem to a non-technical team member. How did you handle it?
Tell me about a time you worked on a challenging team project. How did you collaborate to ensure its success?
Where do you see your career heading in the next three to five years?
If offered this position, what is your notice period or earliest available start date?

role_based_generator_logic.description: Rules for dynamically pulling questions during Phase 3: Role-based Evaluation.

rules.strategy: Select 1 question from Career Journey (Fresher), 1 from Teamwork (Technical). Emphasize coursework, fundamental knowledge, and basic problem-solving skills.
Select 1 question from Career Journey (Experienced), 1 from Teamwork (Technical). Emphasize system design, past deliverables, architectural decisions, and technical leadership.
Select 1 question from Career Journey (Fresher), 1 from Teamwork (Non-technical). Emphasize adaptability, communication skills, and willingness to learn.
Select 1 question from Career Journey (Experienced), 1 from Teamwork (Non-technical). Emphasize leadership, process improvement, stakeholder management, and measurable business impact.
